commands.review_summary:
Threads target agent identity through subagent run registration, infers task `agent_id` from `childSessionKey`, and adds subagent/task registry regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +105. Total +111 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main builds child session keys from the target agent but resolves task `agentId` from explicit/owner/requester ids only, and CI provides a concrete failing path for the PR's new test type error.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Queue a narrow PR-branch repair because both blockers are mechanical: fix the new test helper call and make gateway agent filtering respect explicit task attribution.

target.title: fix: attribute spawned task runs to child agent
